text.t: [Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: I was offered this for sale from Twin Maiden Husks after killing Maliketh. Possibly just something I didn't claim from Gideon? Reply: Can confirm, it's from doing the requirement but not picking it up. Good to know that it's available other ways if you miss the dialogue.

[Threaded comment] Your version of Excel allows you to read this threaded comment; however, any edits to it will get removed if the file is opened in a newer version of Excel. Learn more: https://go.microsoft.com/fwlink/?linkid=870924 Comment: I think this was meant to be Magic Glintblade, Carian Greatsword has two instances and Magic Glintblade has none Reply: Weird, I know it was before. Not sure how that changed. Thank you for pointing this out. I really appreciate the feedback!
